rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Vlad Coods Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admission Nos. 1, 3, 9 And 14; Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF VLAD COOD Vlad Coods Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Admission Nos. 1, 3, 9 And 14; Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is denied as to the Requests fro Admissions, moot. Motion is GRANTED as to the Requests for Production for Cross-Complainant to serve amended verified responses within 20 days. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2016, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTS JAKE NG and STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. Cross-Complaint fails to allege and fails to show that amendment is possible for her to allege facts showing entitlement to attorneys' fees under PAGA. See Woodland Hills v. City Council (1979) 23 Cal.3d 917; Beach Colony v. Cal. Coastal Commission (2015) 166 Cal.App.3d 106. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Sever And Have Cross Complainants Causes Of Action Tried Separately And To Stay Action Pending Resolution Of The Main Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2016, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTS JAKE NG and STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Sever And Have Cross Complainants Causes Of Action Tried Separately And To Stay Action Pending Resolution Of The Main Action GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint is severed and stayed until the final resolution of the complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARY NICHOLS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 9, 2016, line 7. Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injunction Should Not Be Issued OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff failed to comply with Court's January 15, 2016 order, which required personal service on all defendants by 4:00 p.m. on January 15, 2016. Proof of Service indicates that the documents were "caused" to be served (no declaration from the actual server) only on one of the two defendants on January 19, 2016. TRO is dissolved. = (501/REQ)
